architecture.summary: Simplification refactoring: strip init.ts from 1242 to ~300 lines. Remove brownfield/greenfield, repo hosting, umbrella cloning, issue tracker setup. Keep core scaffolding: adapter detection, provider detection, directory creation, config generation, template copy, plugin install. No new architecture, only removal.

integrations.summary: N/A - this feature REMOVES integration prompts (GitHub/ADO/Bitbucket/JIRA). External tool setup moves to sync-setup command. detectProvider() silently reads .git/config.

ui-ux.summary: CLI UX: simplified banner showing project/adapter/provider/language/defaults. Guided next-steps with 3 follow-up commands. --quick flag for zero prompts. Interactive mode max 2 prompts.

performance.summary: Target: init completes in < 10 seconds. Achieved by removing all external API calls, wizard flows, and repo cloning from the command.

security.summary: N/A - no auth, secrets, or sensitive data handling. Removing env file reading from init. Credentials handled by sync-setup instead.

edge-cases.summary: Backward compatibility: existing config.json with sync/umbrella/issueTracker sections still work (optional chaining). Re-init detection preserved. Path guards preserved. No breaking changes.
